0=Never or 1 day

2=7-11 days (half or more of the days)
3=12-14 days (nearly every day)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
156 D0500J1_STF_SHRT_TMPR_CD D0500J1_STF_SHRT_TMPR_CD D0500J1 Staff Assessment of Resident Mood - Short Temper Code CHAR 1 The data in this column contains the staff assessment whether the resident is short-tempered
